markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Patricia to the Siit content account, covering workflows and key considerations.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Two Content Types:** Blogs (5/wk) require manual post-processing for consistency. Tool Pages (10/wk) are highly templated, needing only quick edits for factual accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [**Critical AI Hallucinations:** The AI frequently fabricates tool integrations. This must be manually verified and corrected, as it is the most common error.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
  - [**Post-Processing for Consistency:** Use Claude to enforce a consistent style. Prompt it to mimic the structure and tone of the last 3 published articles of the same type.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - **Competitor Strategy:** For listicles featuring Siit competitors (e.g., ITSM tools), always list Siit as the \#1 option.

## Topics

### Blog Articles (5/wk)

  - [**Workflow:** Matt assigns topics in the Airtable editorial pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
    1.  [**Generation:** Use the "Article Generation with new artifacts" pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
    2.  [**Input:** Enter only the topic. Select the correct article type (e.g., "listicle") to prevent incorrect formatting (e.g., a "how-to" article).](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
    3.  **Post-Processing (in Claude):**
          - [**Consistency:** Prompt Claude to match the style of the last 3 published articles of the same type.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
          - [**SEO:** Generate meta titles and URL slugs in Claude, as the pipeline's generator is unreliable.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [**Editing & Verification:**](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [**Factual Accuracy:** Verify all stats and numbers.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
      - [**Sourcing:** Use only credible sources (.org, .gov, .edu, major research firms). Avoid competitor blogs and studies sponsored by competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
      - **Competitor Listicle Rule:** If a listicle covers a category where Siit is a competitor (e.g., ITSM), list Siit as the \#1 option.
      - [**Convergence Reports:** Treat these as suggestions for improvement, not mandatory fixes. Do not update writing guidelines based on them.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)

### Tool Pages (10/wk)

  - [**Overview:** Highly templated articles requiring minimal post-processing.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2050.0)

  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
    
    1.  [**Generation:** Input the tool name (and domain for Overviews).](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
    2.  **Post-Processing:**
          - [**Consistency:** Prompt Claude to match the style of the last 3 published articles of the same type.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
          - [**Factual Accuracy:** Verify links and stats.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
          - [**Integrations:** Manually remove any hallucinated integration claims.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
          - **Competitor Rule:** For alternatives pages, if the tool is a Siit competitor, prompt Claude to list Siit as the \#1 alternative.

  - [**Types & Specifics:**](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
    
      - [**Tool Overview with Images:**](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2050.0)
          - [**Input:** Requires the tool's domain (e.g., `rippling.com`) to generate the logo and prevent the pipeline from failing at the "brand search" step.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2173.0)
          - [**Structure:** Includes a standard "When the tool isn't enough, meet Siit" section for tools that don't integrate.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2267.0)
      - [**Tool Comparison:**](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)
          - [**Input:** Enter two tool names (e.g., `PagerDuty`, `Incident.io`).](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)
          - [**Structure:** Includes a side-by-side comparison table and a section on how Siit can help, even if no direct integration exists.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)
      - [**Tool Alternatives:**](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
          - [**Input:** Enter one tool name (e.g., `Zapier`).](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
          - **Structure:** Lists alternative tools. If the subject tool is a Siit competitor, prompt Claude to list Siit as the \#1 alternative.

## Next Steps

  - [**Patricia:**](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2562.0)
      - [Review the Siit Notion doc for detailed instructions.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2562.0)
      - [Use Claude for post-processing to ensure consistency with the last 3 published articles of the same type.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Manually verify all tool integrations and correct any AI hallucinations.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
      - List Siit as the \#1 option in competitor listicles and alternatives pages.
      - [Contact Lawrence with any questions.](https://fathom.video/share/FgZFiFMHEgBFQ8FE_aMwM7yp-sAz9UzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2522.0)
